title: Create /onboarding/tenant step 1 (location preferences)
description: Create the first step of tenant onboarding — a page where tenants enter the areas they're looking to rent in.
acceptance_criteria: A text input for adding locations (city or area name)
An 'Add' button that appends the entered location as a tag/chip below the input
Tags are removable with an ✕ button
A 'Next' button navigates to /onboarding/tenant-step-2 (or step 2 on the same page)
At least one location is required before 'Next' is enabled
